sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15468" key="a)rrenokoi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρενο-κοίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sodomite,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.686</biblScope> </bibl>; (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀρσ-</etym>) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg007.perseus-grc1:6:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Cor.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
